title: [codereview-pass1] lichen-rpl doc update for CCP-16
description: Review of first chunk (doc in lib.rs:6-9): Addition accurately describes TDMA/adaptive-SF/multi-channel/density features and ties to DIO metrics. No correctness issues. Links to test/vectors/ccp_load_balancing.json would strengthen it. Filed under da2q.16.7. P3 opinion.
